rooms.title: SIGNATURE LUXURY SUITE
rooms.description: Experience the exceptional in Tangier in our 150 sqm Signature Suite at La Teral. This prestige apartment combines elegance and natural light to offer a refined atmosphere with breathtaking views of the sea and mountains. Perfect for families, it features three spacious, soundproofed bedrooms, one of which offers an elegant and friendly corner for your relaxation moments or breakfasts. Share warm moments in our two large modern living rooms or prepare your meals at home in a state-of-the-art, ultra-equipped kitchen (coffee machine, washing machine, oven…) opening onto a sunny terrace. The ultimate luxury? Its two private balconies offering a spectacular view of the city and the mountains.
features: 3 Spacious Bedrooms: 2 Bedrooms: Double bed, wardrobe with safe and smart TV. One of them has a warm living corner with sofas opening directly onto a balcony with a magnificent view. 1 Bedroom: Two single beds and Smart TV.
Sleep Plus: High quality hypoallergenic bedding, Smart TV in each bedroom and guaranteed peace and quiet for total rest.
2 Modern Living Rooms: Spacious areas with extra comfortable sofas, refined carpet and Smart TV. A prayer rug at your disposal.
Ultra-equipped kitchen with appliances: Gas hob and extractor hood, oven, microwave, electric kettle, coffee machine, refrigerator, freezer, washing machine; and all essential utensils.
2 elegant bathrooms: Modern shower, clean towels, hairdryer and toiletries provided.
2 Balconies with mountain views.
Sunny patio.
Central air conditioning
Soundproofed windows
Free high-speed Wi-Fi
FREE secure parking
Free housekeeping service throughout the stay
Continuous hot and cold water

rooms.title: A HAVEN OF CALM & COMFORT
rooms.description: Treat yourself to a peaceful stay in this modern 65 sqm apartment, designed for your well-being. Enjoy two cozy bedrooms with hypoallergenic bedding, a bright living room with Smart TV, a fully equipped kitchen opening onto a sunny terrace, and a modern bathroom. Every detail, from the central air conditioning to the perfect soundproofing, has been designed to offer you total serenity.
features: 2 comfortable bedrooms: Bedroom 1: Double bed, Smart TV, safe & wardrobe. Bedroom 2: 2 single beds + Smart TV.
Plus: High quality hypoallergenic bedding, soundproofed windows, central air conditioning.
Living room: Bright space with comfortable sofa & Smart TV. Prayer rug available.

Fully equipped kitchen: Electric hob, extractor hood, built-in microwave oven, refrigerator, washing machine, capsule coffee machine, kettle. Glasses, plates, cutlery, saucepans, cups and pans provided.
Sunny terrace.
Bathroom: Modern shower, clean towels, hairdryer and toiletries provided: soap, shower gel and shampoo.
Central air conditioning
Soundproofed windows
Free high-speed Wi-Fi
FREE secure parking
Free housekeeping service throughout the stay
Continuous hot and cold water

rooms.title: THE PERFECT BALANCE BETWEEN MODERNITY AND SERENITY
rooms.description: Enjoy a large 73 sqm apartment, ideally located in the center of Tangier. This modern-design accommodation welcomes you with two elegant bedrooms equipped with Smart TVs and very comfortable beds (hypoallergenic bedding). One of the bedrooms opens onto a private balcony with a superb view of the city and the mountains. The living room is spacious and bright. With its comfortable sofas, elegant carpet and large Smart TV, it is the perfect place to relax. The kitchen is modern, fully equipped and opens onto a sunny terrace.
features: 2 comfortable bedrooms: Bedroom 1: Double bed, wardrobe, safe and flat-screen TV. Opens onto a private balcony with a superb view. Bedroom 2: Two single beds with Smart TV.
Plus: High quality hypoallergenic bedding, soundproofed windows, central air conditioning.
Living room: Bright and modern with comfortable sofas, designer table and Smart TV. Prayer rug available.
Fully equipped kitchen: Electric hob, extractor hood, built-in microwave oven, refrigerator, washing machine, coffee machine and kettle. Glasses, plates, cutlery, saucepans, cups and pans provided.
Patio: The kitchen opens onto a sunny patio.
1 Bathroom: Modern shower, clean towels, hairdryer and toiletries provided: soap, shower gel and shampoo.
Central air conditioning
Soundproofed windows
Free high-speed Wi-Fi
FREE secure parking
Free housekeeping service throughout the stay
Continuous hot and cold water

rooms.title: THE ALLIANCE OF COMFORT AND WARMTH
rooms.description: Welcome to a modern and warm setting, designed for your absolute well-being. This spacious 73 sqm apartment welcomes you with two cozy bedrooms, each equipped with its own Smart TV, hypoallergenic bedding and soundproofed windows to guarantee you totally calm nights. Relax in a light-filled living room, also equipped with a large Smart TV, or enjoy your equipped kitchen opening onto a private balcony with a breathtaking view. Its contemporary bathroom completes this ideal comfort haven for your stays in Tangier.
features: 2 comfortable bedrooms: Bedroom 1: Double bed, wardrobe, safe and flat-screen TV. Bedroom 2: Two single beds with Smart TV.

rooms.title: COZY & BRIGHT
rooms.description: Stay in a modern and soothing setting, ideally located in the heart of Tangier. Apartment No. 5 welcomes you with two comfortable bedrooms designed for your rest, as well as a bright living room with plush sofas and a Smart TV for your relaxation moments. Its fully equipped kitchen and contemporary bathroom with shower offer all the comfort you need for a "home away from home" stay.
features: 2 comfortable bedrooms: Bedroom 1: Double bed, Smart TV, safe & wardrobe. Bedroom 2: 2 single beds + Smart TV.

rooms.title: ELEGANCE AND BREATHTAKING VIEWS
rooms.description: Stay in a modern and refined setting in the heart of Tangier. This spacious 73 sqm apartment welcomes you with two elegant bedrooms and a bright living room, equipped with extra comfortable sofas and a Smart TV for your relaxation moments. Its modern, fully equipped kitchen opens onto a pleasant sunny terrace, while its private balcony offers a breathtaking view of the sea and the mountains. Designed for your family holidays or business trips, this haven of peace includes everything you need for a worry-free stay.

rooms.title: LUXURY AND SERENITY
rooms.description: Treat yourself to an exceptional stay at the LA TERAL Apart-Hotel, in the heart of Tangier. This chic 73 sqm apartment combines luxury and serenity to welcome families, business travelers and groups of friends in absolute comfort. Enjoy two elegantly designed bedrooms, air-conditioned, perfectly soundproofed and each equipped with its own Smart TV. Relax in a modern and warm living room or prepare your meals in a fully equipped kitchen. A true charming asset, it opens onto a private balcony offering a soothing view of the mountains and the city. A contemporary bathroom and quality services complete this ideal haven for your stay.
features: 2 comfortable bedrooms: Bedroom 1: Double bed, wardrobe with integrated safe. Bedroom 2: Two comfortable single beds.
Sleep Plus: Hypoallergenic bedding, central air conditioning, soundproofed windows and Smart TV in each bedroom.
Bright modern living room with comfortable sofas, designer table and Smart TV. Prayer rug available.

Fully equipped kitchen: Electric hob, extractor hood, built-in microwave oven, refrigerator, washing machine, capsule coffee machine and kettle. Glasses, plates, cutlery, saucepans, cups and pans provided.
